product_overview: SYNAPSE is a web-based study ecosystem for medical learners that combines AI tutoring, spaced-repetition notebooks, clinical case simulations, community features and focus music to accelerate mastery. The product unifies active-recall workflows and multimodal AI assistance (see Synapse architecture document, pages 1-3) into a single frontend experience.
core_goals: Unify study resources into a single workflow that supports active recall and a linked 'digital brain' (Zettelkasten style).
Provide an AI tutor integrated into notebook chat to synthesize content, generate flashcards and simulate clinical cases.
Implement the FSRS spaced-repetition approach to optimize review intervals and maximize retention while reducing daily workload.
Offer a QBank and OSCE-style clinical case simulator to translate knowledge into diagnostic decision-making and practical skills.
Enable offline sync and enterprise-grade security (SOC2/ISO 27001) so users can study reliably in clinical settings.
Reduce administrative research/writing time (citations, summaries) via multimodal AI tools and automated content generation.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and sign in with email/password via Supabase, protecting access to study content and personalized data. Entry page: /login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login/Register button to submit -> See redirect to /study
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (invalid) -> Click Login/Register button to submit -> See inline error message and remain on /login

features.name: Create Notebook
features.description: Create and configure study notebooks (name, specialty, description, icon, color) to organize learning materials. Entry page: /study.
user_flows: Navigate to /study -> Click "Nuevo Cuaderno" button to open modal -> Fill notebook name -> Select specialty from dropdown -> Fill description -> Select icon and color -> Click "Crear cuaderno" button -> See new notebook appear in list and open /study/notebook/:id
Navigate to /study -> Click "Nuevo Cuaderno" button to open modal -> Leave notebook name empty -> Click "Crear cuaderno" button -> See validation error about required name and modal remains open

features.name: AI Notebook Chat
features.description: Interact with the AI tutor inside a notebook chat to ask questions, receive explanations, and trigger studio tools (flashcards, occlusion) for active learning. Entry page: /study/notebook/:id.
user_flows: Navigate to /study/notebook/:id -> Type a message in the input field -> Click send button or press Enter -> See AI response appear in chat history -> Use Studio Sidebar option (Flashcards) -> See flashcards generated for current topic
Navigate to /study/notebook/:id -> Type a message in the input field -> Click send button -> See loading indicator -> See error message 'Could not reach AI service' and a Retry button

features.name: Clinical Cases (Simulator)
features.description: Practice clinical scenarios and OSCE-style interactions that provide structured feedback and link back to study notes and flashcards. Entry page: /clinical-cases.
user_flows: Navigate to /clinical-cases -> Click Start Case -> Read case prompt and history -> Answer case questions or submit diagnosis -> Receive structured feedback and score -> Option to generate related flashcards
Navigate to /clinical-cases -> Click Start Case -> Loading spinner appears -> See network error message when case fails to load -> Click Retry to attempt reload

features.name: Community Feed
features.description: Post, browse and interact with community content to share insights, compare rankings, and join group challenges. Entry page: /community.
user_flows: Navigate to /community -> Click New Post -> Fill post title -> Fill post body -> Click Publish -> See post appear in community feed
Navigate to /community -> Click New Post -> Leave post body empty -> Click Publish -> See validation error 'Content required' and remain in post editor

features.name: Deep Focus Music Generator
features.description: Generate and play ambient audio designed for focused study sessions with adjustable duration and styles. Entry page: /music.
user_flows: Navigate to /music -> Select focus duration and style -> Click Generate/Play -> Audio starts playing and timer begins -> See visual focus UI while music plays
Navigate to /music -> Select focus duration and style -> Click Generate/Play -> See error 'Audio generation failed' and offered fallback to pre-recorded tracks

features.name: User Settings & Preferences
features.description: Manage account and app preferences including offline sync, notifications and profile details. Entry page: /settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle offline sync option -> Click Save -> See confirmation message 'Settings saved' and sync state updated
Navigate to /settings -> Edit email field with invalid format -> Click Save -> See inline validation error and no changes saved
